title: Coordinate Display
description: Displays your coordinates above your hotbar at all times
body:
# Coordinate Display

This data pack displays your coordinates above your hotbar at all times, eleminating the need to constantly check the cluttered f3 menu. 

![The coordinates showing up above the hotbar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/CDD43yqg/images/7bdb1e6f623c45b3d647fff244addec1f39ed6ca.png)

This data pack was originally made for version 1.16, but it still works up to 1.20.4 (and probably later versions if you're reading this in the future).
